summary: Iteration 146 - P0 Performance Optimization for Story To Video Fast Pipeline VERIFIED. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend Story Video Studio page loads correctly. Fast pipeline features working: parallel image+voice generation, single-pass ffmpeg, async R2 upload, granular progress tracking.
critical_code_review_comments: Fast pipeline at /api/story-video-studio/fast/* is correctly implemented
Parallel image+voice generation works (images_generated + voices_generated in timing)
Single-pass ffmpeg video assembly completes in ~12s for 3 scenes
Async R2 upload completes in ~4s for video files
Copyright compliance correctly blocks trademarked characters (Mickey Mouse, Elsa, Pokemon, Spider-Man)
Credit costs properly tiered: 50 (small), 80 (medium), 120 (large) based on scene count
Timing breakdown shows parallel_media_s is bottleneck (107.8s / 131s total = 82%)
Bottleneck is external GPT Image 1 API (20-50s per image) - cannot be optimized further

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Story Video Studio page loads correctly with all UI elements

context_for_next_testing_agent: Fast video pipeline is optimized. Benchmark job 29ff0a96-4839-4fa5-b388-0fdef7b7b4eb completed in 131s with breakdown: scene_gen=7s, parallel_media=107.8s, assembly=12s, upload=4.1s. The bottleneck is GPT Image 1 API which takes 20-50s per image. All internal optimizations (parallel processing, single-pass ffmpeg, async upload) are working correctly.

fast_status_api.returns: job details with timing breakdown (scene_generation_s, parallel_media_s, video_assembly_s, r2_upload_s)

fast_generate_api.note: Full generation takes 100-130s due to external GPT Image 1 API
